title: Brushstroke
content:
On rue Vincingetorix,
        a Paris hovel
        in a garret of cold -
        Gauguin enchanted
        serpentine colours, the medium of
        a brushstroke from
        a paltry primitivism.

        Rue Vincingetorix,
        cloudy haze
        sun as billowing plaster,
        neatly laps
        scrapes clean
        the bereavement
        of a man's pain.
meaning:
"Brushstroke" is a quintessential example of Paul Cameron Brown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
